/CAL:PRELIMINARY HEARING/X:JUDGE BRADEN C, WOODS, PRESIDING/DAWT/X:DA ORAL MOTION FOR CONTINUANCE IS GRANTED/30    CACM ELIG RPT, DOP/X:MATTER IS REFERRED TO PRE-TRIAL DIVERSION FOR AN IN-CUSTODY ASSESSMENT,/CONTD:ACM POST-ARRAIGNMENT ELIGIBILITY REPORT & PRELIMINARY HEARING/DOP/

/CAL: ARRAIGNMENT/X: HEATHER HAMILTON APPEARS FOR THE PUBLIC DEFENDER'S OFFICE WITH ERIC MCBURNEY ON THE BEHALF OF SLIMAN NAWABI/987,2/TEXT:DEFT ENTNG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURRER,/NTW/CAUSE1/LDPX: 03-16-21 (30TH)/SHER/BAIL: 25000/CTORD:IF BAIL IS MEET:/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSD/CTORD:DEFENDANT IS TO REPORT TO 70OAK GROVE BY 12:00 PM ON THE NEXT BUSINESS DAY/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/4011,6/X: REPORT DUE 02-26-21/SA2: 840 ELLIS STREET, SF, CA/SAORD3/SAORD/CONTD: PRELIMINARY HEARING AND 4011,6/TE: 45 MINUTES/DOP/
